rpcs.description: GUI 2319 Critical Comment Tab 6.   PASS IEN OF FILE 668   RETURN RESULTS ARRAY FROM FILE 665 CRITICAL COMMENTS FIELD.   RESUTLS()=ONE LINE AT A TIME OF THE WORD PROCESSING FIELD. ONE LINE TO  INFINITE.

rpcs.name: RMPR DIS LIST
rpcs.description: GUI 2319 MAS DISABILITY AND PERCENT.   PASS IEN OF FILE 668.   RETURN RESULTS FROM FILE #2.   RESULTS()=DISABILITY DESCRIPTION^%^SC YESorNO. One line or multiple lines.

rpcs.name: RMPR ADD ITEM
rpcs.description: RPC to send purchasing information to file 666 GUI PURCHASING FILE.

rpcs.name: RMPR LAST PT MOVEMENTS
rpcs.description: This procedure supplies the data for the Last 2 inpatient movements for  TAB 2 of the GUI 2319. Pass IEN to Prosthetic Suspense (#668)   Return RESULTS Array and Example:   RESULTS(0)=Name RESULTS(1)=SSN RESULTS(2)=DOB RESULTS(3)=Claim # RESULTS(4)= if 1 Yes a movement RESULTS(5)=Transaction type RE

rpcs.name: RMPR VEN ADDRESS
rpcs.description: Dispaly vendor address, phone and fax number

rpcs.name: RMPR CLINIC ENROLLMENT
rpcs.description: This procedure supplies the Clinic Enrollment data for  TAB 2 of the GUI 2319.   Example of RESULTS    RESULTS(0)=CLINIC RESULTS(1)=DATE ENROLLED RESULTS(2)=OPT OR AC RESULTS(3)=STARTS OVER WITH NEXT CLINIC

rpcs.name: RMPR CPRS DISPLAY
rpcs.description: GUI CPRS SUSPENSE DETAIL DISPLAY.   PASS THE IEN OF FILE 668   RETURN RESULTS:  RESUTLS()=^TMP("GMRCR",

rpcs.name: RMPR CLINIC LETTER LIST
rpcs.description: This procedure supplies the Clinic Letter List data for  TAB 2 of the GUI 2319.   Pass IEN to Prosthetic Suspense (#668)   Return RESULTS Array IEN of file 665.4^Patient Name^Letter Title^Author^Date Created

rpcs.name: RMPR PENDING APPOINTMENTS
rpcs.description: This procedure supplies the Pending Appointment data for  TAB 2 of the GUI 2319.   Pass IEN to Prosthetic Suspense (#668)   Returned  RESULTS Array: RESULTS(0)=DATE/TIME^CLINIC^STATUS^TYPE

rpcs.description: Check if user has any Purchase Cards Assigened.   RESULTS(0)=You are not an authorized Purchase Card User, CONTACT FISCAL! Or RESULTS(0)=You are not defined in the Prosthetics Site Parameter File. Or RESULTS(0)=9 Ien to file 669.9   New X-ref in file 669.9 on Purchasing Agent Field.  Set with rout

rpcs.name: RMPR CLINIC LETTER DISPLAY
rpcs.description: This procedure supplies the Clinic Letter Display data for  TAB 2 of the GUI 2319.   Pass IEN to Prosthetic Suspense (#665.4)   Return RESULTS Array One line of the letter at a time from word processsing fields. The number of lines will vary.

rpcs.name: RMPR TRANS LIST EXPANDED
rpcs.description: GUI 2319 Expansion of Screen 4 Transaction list.

rpcs.name: RMPR TRANS HOME O2 RX
rpcs.description: RX information for screen 8 of the GUI 2319 Home Oxygen.   Pass: IEN of File 660  RESULTS(0)=THE NUMBER OF PRESCRIPTIONS RESULTS(1)=DATE PRESCRIPTION WRITTEN RESULTS(2)=DATE PRESCRIPTION EXPIRES

rpcs.description: This procedure supplies the View Request screen of file 668.   Entry Point:   EN(RESULTS,RMPRA)^RMPR9VR   RESULTS(0)= Order date/Suspense date RESULTS(1)= Requestor RESULTS(2)= Suspended by RESULTS(3)= Initial Action Date RESULTS(4)= Completion Date

rpcs.name: RMPR VIEW REQ DESC
rpcs.description: This procedure supplies the View Request Description display of file #668. Entry Point:  EN2(RESULTS,RMPRA)^RMPR9VR   RESULTS Array:  Word processing fields 0-infinite lines. .

rpcs.name: RMPR VIEW REQ IA NOTE
rpcs.description: This procedure supplies the View Request Initial Action Note display of  file #668. Entry Point:  EN3(RESULTS,RMPRA)^RMPR9VR   RESULTS Array:  Word processing fields 0-infinite lines.

rpcs.name: RMPR VIEW REQ COMP NOTE
rpcs.description: This procedure supplies the View Request Completion Note of file #668. . Entry Point:  EN4(RESULTS,RMPRA)^RMPR9VR   RESULTS Array:  Word processing fields 0-infinite lines.

rpcs.name: RMPR DOR
rpcs.description: GUI Order controll processing.  Returns the list of all open pending  consults from file 668.

rpcs.name: ORWOR1 SETDTEXT
rpcs.description: Sets/updates the external text of an order. The updated text is also returned.

rpcs.name: ORWOR1 GETDEA
rpcs.description: Returns a users DEA number.

rpcs.name: ORWOR1 GETDSCH
rpcs.description: Returns the schedule of the drug.

rpcs.name: DVBAB TEAM PATIENTS
rpcs.description: Function returns an array of patients on a team.

rpcs.name: DVBAB REPORTS
rpcs.description: CAPRI REGIONAL OFFICE 21 DAY CERTIFICATE PRINTING

rpcs.name: DVBAB MAIL INIT
rpcs.description: Init Mailman variables. Return string: e-mail address^

rpcs.name: DVBAB MPI ASSIGN ICN
rpcs.description: This call should be made after a new patient is added into the patient  file.  It will call the MPI to assign an ICN.  If no ICN can be obtained  after 30 seconds, a local ICN will be assigned and the local ICN flag set.

rpcs.name: DVBAB REPORT ADMISSION INQUIRY
rpcs.description: Returns display text indicating when the report was last run

rpcs.name: DVBAB REPORT NEW NOTICES DC
rpcs.description: Broker-enabled version of option DVBA NOTICE/DISCHARGE PRINT, Print New Notices of Discharge.

rpcs.name: ORQQCN UNRESOLVED
rpcs.description: Returns 1 if current user has unresolved consults for current patient, 0  if not.

rpcs.name: ORWU DEFAULT DIVISION
rpcs.description: Returns True or False for a user depending on default division  information.

rpcs.name: ORWU1 NEWLOC
rpcs.description: Returns a list of Clinics, Wards, and "Other" category entries from the  HOSPITAL LOCATION (#44) file.

rpcs.name: ORQQPXRM GET WH LETTER TEXT
rpcs.description: Retrieve letter text for a WH letter

rpcs.name: ORQQPXRM GET WH LETTER TYPE
rpcs.description: Return value from file 790.403

rpcs.name: ORQQPXRM GET WH PROC RESULT
rpcs.description: Return correct values for a WH procedure populate a combo box in Reminder Dialog.

rpcs.name: ORQQPXRM WOMEN HEALTH SAVE
rpcs.description: Pass back data to be file in the Women's Health Package file 790.1.

rpcs.name: ORB FORWARD ALERT
rpcs.description: The rpc forwards an alert.

rpcs.name: ORB RENEW ALERT
rpcs.description: This rpc renews an alert.

rpcs.name: ORQQPXRM GET WH REPORT TEXT
rpcs.description: This RPC will return the Radiology/Lab Report for a WH Procedure

rpcs.name: VAFC REMOTE AUDIT
rpcs.description: This Remote Procedure Call will allow users to pull an audit report from a remote site.

rpcs.name: IBD GET SCAN PAGE INFO
rpcs.description: This RPC will return an array where the data reflects the page number of scannable pages, Piece 2 will display the date/time received.

rpcs.name: OOPS GET INSTITUTIONS
rpcs.description: This broker call will retrieve all the stations from the INSTITUTION (#4) file.

rpcs.name: OOPS SENSITIVE DATA
rpcs.description: This Broker call is used to pass data to the bulletin routine for supervisors accessing sensitive data and not creating an ASISTS case.

rpcs.name: RMPFDEMOG
rpcs.description: Accepts the patient DFN and returns an array containing predefined demographic information

rpcs.name: GMV GET VITAL TYPE IEN
rpcs.description: Returns the IEN if the value is found in the GMRV VITAL TYPE (#120.51) file.   This remote procedure call is documented in Integration Agreement 4357.

rpcs.name: GMV GET CATEGORY IEN
rpcs.description: Returns the IEN if the value is found in the GMRV VITAL CATEGORY (#120.53) file.   This remote procedure call is documented in Integration Agreement 4354.

rpcs.name: EC GETVERSION
rpcs.description: Returns the server version of a particular option.  This is used by ECS GUI  to determine the current server version of the software.

rpcs.name: ACKQAUD1
rpcs.description: This RPC gets the audiogram data for the selected entry in the Audiometric Exam Data file 509850.9 and returns it to the calling program in the array ACKQARR() This is for the Audiometric Display only.

rpcs.description: Input the IEN of the 509850.9 file entry as the second parameter. Input the DFN as the third parameter, array by reference as first returns a subscripted array of data values for this audiogram data for the patient. Currently only uses 0 node for information. Used in the Enter/Edit Audiogram Delphi

rpcs.name: DSIC XUTIL NAME COMPONENT
rpcs.description: This will take a standard VistA person name in the format Last,First M  and return the individual name components.

rpcs.name: DSIC FM DINUM
rpcs.description: This will do a lookup on the inputted file for the requested value.  This  is only for files whose .01 field is defined to be a DINUM pointer to a file.  If the lookup value in not in the inputted file, then this will  add that pointer to that file.

rpcs.name: DSIC DPT GET DEMO
rpcs.description: This will return specific patient demographic elements for a patient

rpcs.name: DSIC DDR FILER
rpcs.description: This calls FILE^DIE to file data.  It can only file data at a single  level (top, multiple, a multiple within a multiple, etc.).  It presumes  you know how to set Param[x] properly in Fileman syntax.

rpcs.name: DSIC DDR FINDER
rpcs.description: Call FIND^DIC to get a list of matches on the file for the input value

rpcs.name: DSIC DDR GETS ENTRY DATA
rpcs.description: This calls GETS^DIQ to get a list of field values for a record

rpcs.name: DSIC DDR LISTER
rpcs.description: This calls the Fileman lister, LIST^DIC to get a list of records matching  the input value

rpcs.name: DSIC DDR DELETE ENTRY
rpcs.description: This will delete a record from a file or subfile.

rpcs.name: DSIC DDR UPDATE FILE
rpcs.description: This will add a new record to a file, but only at the top level of the  file.   It does not allow for adding a new record to a multiple.   Additional fields to be filed at the same time can be passed.

rpcs.name: DSIC DDR UPDATE SUBFILE
rpcs.description: This will add a new record to a multiple in a file.   The multiple can be  at any level as long as the IENS is properly defined.  Additional fields  can filed with the record.

rpcs.name: DSIC DDR WP FILER
rpcs.description: This will file the text into the specified word processing field.

rpcs.name: DSIC DDVG XLATE IDX2DATA
rpcs.description: This will return the external format for an internal Fileman field value

rpcs.name: DSIC DDVG XLATE DATA2IDX
rpcs.description: Will take an external value and perform a FILEMAN lookup.    Restrictions are: 1.  The external value must be resolvable to a unique entry. 2.  There must be an index on the field that contains the value.

rpcs.name: DSIC DM GET STATUS
rpcs.description: This will return the status(es) of import requests for an individual DSS  application. If you pass the transaction ID then the status of that transaction will be returned.  You can also retrieve the statuses of all requests or all requests of a certain status.

rpcs.name: DSIC DM ADD/DELETE QUEUE
rpcs.description: This will allow you to add or delete an entry to file 19621.  When you  use the VistA Imaging import an image API, you are returned a queue  number. rpcs.name: DSIC ADD PROBLEM
rpcs.description: Add a new problem to the problem list

rpcs.name: DSIC UPDATE PROBLEM
rpcs.description: This will update an existing problem

rpcs.name: DSIC SEND MAIL MSG
rpcs.description: This will send a Mailman message

rpcs.name: DSIC SEND ALERT
rpcs.description: RPC to send an alert

rpcs.name: DSIC XPAR ADD

rpcs.name: DSIC XPAR EDIT
rpcs.description: This is used to change the value or delete an existing parameter value

rpcs.name: DSIC DATE CONVERT
rpcs.description: This will take a date in any format and convert it to any other format.

rpcs.name: DSIC XPD LAST INSTALL
rpcs.description: This returns the latest installed version of a KIDS build.  It gets the  data from the INSTALL file.

rpcs.description: This invokes the Kernel API to determine if a patch has been installed or  not.  As such, it requires that the application has an associated PACKAGE  file entry.  This will not work for VEJD applications, but will work for DSI applications.

rpcs.description: This will use the Kernel API to determine the current version of an  application.

rpcs.name: DSIC PX IMMUN LIST

rpcs.name: DSIC CPT ACTIVE/VALIDATE
rpcs.description: This will tell you whether or not a CPT code is active as of the date  that you pass in.

rpcs.name: DSIC CPT GET CODE
rpcs.description: This returns various information about a specific CPT code.

rpcs.name: DSIC CPT GET DETAIL DESC
rpcs.description: This returns the full description for a code

rpcs.name: DSIC CPT GET MODIFIER LIST
rpcs.description: Return a list of all acceptable modifiers for a CPT code

rpcs.name: DSIC CPT GET MODIFIER
rpcs.description: This returns basic information for a MODIFIER, file 81.3

rpcs.name: DSIC CPT MOD PAIR
rpcs.description: This will check to see if a modifier can be used with a code as of the  input date.

rpcs.name: DSIC ICD9 ACTIVE
rpcs.description: Verify that an ICD9 code is active as of a certain date

rpcs.name: DSIC ICD9 GET DIAGNOSIS
rpcs.description: This will return specific information for a diagnosis code

rpcs.name: DSIC XPAR GET WP
rpcs.description: This will return text for a word processing type parameter for an entity  and instance.

rpcs.name: DSIC XPAR MULT ACTION
rpcs.description: This is a multi-function front end to the Parameter APIs.  It allows you  with a single RPC call to take edit type actions on several  parameter/entity/instance combinations.   You can only do these actions:  add, change, or delete   Each entry in the passed list is treated as if it was a separate R

rpcs.name: DSIC XIP
rpcs.description: This returns address demographics for a 5 or 9 digit zip code The return value is for the primary location associated with the ZIP code.  if an error:  -1 ^ ERROR MESSAGE  if OK:   Input ZIP code ^ city ^ state ^ county ^ FIPS county code  the return is for the primary location associated with the Z

rpcs.name: DSIC ICD9 GET LIST
rpcs.description: This will return a list of active ICD9 codes for a lookup value.

rpcs.name: DSIC PX GET VISIT INFO
rpcs.description: This RPC is a wrapper around the ENCEVENT^PXKENC api.  It does not return  all the data that the PX api does.  It returns a subset of that data.   The PX api is designed to return all the visit date in the various files  for a VISIT ien.  See routine for more detailed description.

rpcs.name: DSIC DM CHECK
rpcs.description: This will check whether or not the current VistA system supports VistA  Imagings import API.

rpcs.name: DSIC PX PRIMARY
rpcs.description: For a VISIT ien this will return the primary PCE diagnosis and the  primary PCE provider.

rpcs.name: DSIC VA DEFAULT SITE
rpcs.description: This will return the name and station number for a medical center  division.  Optional input parameters are allowed.  However, if not passed  then return the data for the primary division (or institution) as of  TODAY.

rpcs.name: DSIC FM GET FIELD ATTRIB
rpcs.description: This will return the inputted field attributes for a file.   As of 7/29/2003, these attributes are available: AUDIT  AUDIT CONDITION  COMPUTE ALGORITHM  COMPUTED FIELDS USED  DATE FIELD LAST EDITED  DECIMAL DEFAULT  DELETE ACCESS  DESCRIPTION  FIELD LENGTH  GLOBAL SUBSCRIPT LOCATION  HELP-PROMPT  IN

rpcs.name: DSIC FM EXTERNAL
rpcs.description: This will convert an internal formatted data to external format.  This  differs from the GET Fileman calls in that a record ien is not required.   However, it is the responsibility of the developer to make sure that for  the particular file (or subfile) and field that the DD will output the  data wi

rpcs.name: DSIC FM VERIFY FILE
rpcs.description: This will verify whether or not a file exists.

rpcs.name: DSIC FM VERIFY FIELD
rpcs.description: This will verify whether or not a field exists in a file (or subfile).

rpcs.name: DSIC WARD PTF SPECIALTY
rpcs.description: For a ward name (or a pointer to the WARD file), return that ward's   ptf specialty code ^ specialty name ^ specialty service

rpcs.name: DSIC DPT INP INFO
rpcs.description: This with return information about an admission event.  This RPC is a  wrapper around the IN5^VADPT API.  If you pass in a date, then the data  related to that date and admission will be returned,  If no date is  passed, then get inpatient status as of NOW.   For more detailed description, see IN^DS

rpcs.name: DSIC DPT INP INFO BRIEF
rpcs.description: This will return certain data related to a patient's current admission.   The data returned and the order that it is returned is controlled by the  FLAG parameter.  For more detailed description, see routine INQ^DSICDPT

rpcs.name: DSIC ACTIVE USER
rpcs.description: This will determine if a user (DUZ value) is valid and is active.  Also,  additionally screening logic can be passed in to validate a user.

rpcs.name: DSIC FM LIST
rpcs.description: The RPC provides a wrapper around the LIST^DIC API.  It exposes more of  the functionality of the API than the DSIC DDR LISTER RPC.   For a lookup value, return all entries starting from that lookup value  and which collates after that lookup value.

rpcs.name: DSIC ACTIVE USER LIST
rpcs.description: This will return a list of active users matching the lookup value.  You  can pass in additional screening logic if so desired, such as security  keys.   It is the programmers responsibility to ensure that the total length of  the date returned in each return value does not exceed 250 characters.

rpcs.name: DSIC FM FIND
rpcs.description: This provides a wrapper around the FIND^DIC API.  It exposes more of the  functionality of the API to the RPC than the old DSIC DDR FINDER RPC.   For a lookup value, this RPC will return all matches.  It allows for  input a multiple screening logic which would be ANDed together.

rpcs.name: DENTV MULT PARAM
rpcs.description: This will return all instances for a parameter.  The Parameter should be  multi-instance.  The difference between this call and the national XPAR  call is that this call will return a value for every parameter-instance  combination regardless of entity.  It will return the value for the  entity of h

rpcs.name: DENTV INPATIENT BEDSECTION
rpcs.description: This will return a string indicating whether or not the patient is a  current inpatient.  If an inpatient, then also return, if possible, the  PTF Specialty and Dental Bedsection associated with the current ward that  the patient is lodged.

rpcs.name: DSIR ADD DOCUMENT
rpcs.description: This RPC is used to create an entry in file 19620.1 DSIR RELEASED DOCUMENT

rpcs.name: DSIR GET DOCUMENTS
rpcs.description: Get a list of all documents for a request.

rpcs.name: DSIR CLEANUP
rpcs.description: This RPC kills global nodes TMP("DSIROI",$J) and TMP("DSIRVAL",$J).

rpcs.name: DSIR FOLLOWUP REQUIRED LIST
rpcs.description: This RPC finds any entries in file 19620 ROI INSTANCE that require a  follow up letter.

rpcs.name: DSIR CHECK PREV REQ
rpcs.description: This RPC checks for previous request for the current patient and  requestor. It then returns an array of entries in file 19620 ROI INSTANCE.

rpcs.name: DSIR GET DOC DATES
rpcs.description: RETURNS AN ARRAY OF DATES FOR USE IN SCREENING CLINICAL DOCUMENTS

rpcs.name: DSIR SET DOC DATES
rpcs.description: SAVES DATES FOR USE IN SCREENING CLINICAL DOCUMENTS FOR AN ROI REQUEST

rpcs.name: DSIR RPT BY REQUESTOR
rpcs.description: Retrieves ROI requests for a given date range for use in GUI reports.

rpcs.name: DSIR CLERKS LIST
rpcs.description: This RPC compiles a list of ROI clerks in file 19620 ROI INSTANCE.

rpcs.name: DSIR UPDATE ADDRESS
rpcs.description: VEJD ROI UPDATE ADDRESS         Input Record Pieces '^' delimited: 1.      Address File Internal Number - Null to add new record 2.      Patient - Internal Number only (required) 3.      Street Address Line One - Text 35 character max (optional) 4.      Street Address Line Two - Text 35 character ma

rpcs.name: DSIR GET ADDRESSES
rpcs.description: This RPC gets all address know by the RELEASE OF INFORMATION - DSSI for a  given patient or requestor.

rpcs.name: DSIR UPDATE STATUS
rpcs.description: VEJD ROI UPDATE STATUS         Input parameter: 1.      Request Internal Number 2.      Status Internal Code   Return Value: 1.      -1 ^ Error Message 2.      Internal Number to Status History table

rpcs.name: DSIR CURRENT STATUS
rpcs.description: This RPC gets the current status of a request.

rpcs.name: DSIR GET REASONS FOR REQUEST
rpcs.description: Retrieve entries from file 19620.31 DSIR REQUEST REASON.

rpcs.name: DSIR GET REQUEST TYPES
rpcs.description: Retrieve entries from file 19620.61 DSIR TYPE OF REQUEST.

rpcs.name: DSIR GET REQUESTOR TYPES
rpcs.description: Retrieve entries from file 19620.71 DSIR REQUESTOR TYPE.

rpcs.name: DSIR GET AUTHORITY
rpcs.description: This gets the entries from file 19620.51 DSIR AUTHORITY FOR REQUEST.

rpcs.name: DSIR GET ROIS
rpcs.description: This RPC is used to return an array of ROI INSTANCE (File 19620) entries.   GETLIST(AXY,TYPE,STAT,IEN)      ;RPC - DSIR GET ROIS Input: TYPE: Set of Codes:      "P"  : Get list by patient      "C"  : Get list by clerk      "O"  : Get all open or pending requests.             Defaults to all requests

rpcs.name: DSIR ADD/EDIT ROI
rpcs.description: Create new or update existing ROI Instance File 19620.

rpcs.name: DSIR REFORMAT REPORTS
rpcs.description: This RPC will take a given report array and resize the length to fit into  a smaller print area.  It takes into account header and footer lines and  resizes the main body of the report.  It may return more pages than the  input array.  Example: Report A is 60 lines with 3 lines of header and 2  line

rpcs.name: DSIR ADD NONCOMP PAT
rpcs.description: Routine for adding or updating an non-computerized patient for ROI.

rpcs.name: DSIR GET DOCUMENT TYPES
rpcs.description: Retrieve entries from file 19620.4 DSIR DOCUMENT TYPES

rpcs.name: DSIR DELETE REQUESTOR
rpcs.description: This RPC is used to delete orphan requestors or repoint and delete  duplicate requestors.   If the first parameter only is passed the routine will check to see that  the requestor is in fact not used then it will delete the requestor from  file 19620.12.   If both the first and second parameters are

rpcs.name: DSIR YEAR END FOIA REPORT
rpcs.description: This RPC will collect the data for the year end FOIA report for VA Form 0712.

rpcs.name: DSIR GET EXEMPTION 3 INFO
rpcs.description: This returns the values from fields 13.01 thru 13.1.   13.01 - 13.04 are Y/N values indicated by 1 or 0. 13.05 - 13.1 are free text upto 20 characters each.

rpcs.name: DSIR COMP ACCOUNTING SUMMARY
rpcs.description: This RPC returns a list of all internal entry numbers from file 19620 for  a specified patient.

rpcs.name: DSIR GET DIVISIONS
rpcs.description: Return available Divisions for reporting.  Must be in the ADIV cross  reference on file 19620.

rpcs.name: XOBV TEST STRING
rpcs.description: This simple RPC takes a string as input, adds some additional text  to the string and returns the string back to the client.   This RPC is used as part of the test and learning application distributed as part of VistALink.

rpcs.name: XOBV TEST GLOBAL ARRAY
rpcs.description: This simple RPC takes an array as input, sets the array into a global  array and returns the global array information back to the client.   This RPC is used as part of the test and learning application distributed  as part of VistALink.

rpcs.name: XOBV TEST GLOBAL NODE
rpcs.description: This simple RPC takes a string as input, sets it as a global node and returns the global node back to the client.   This RPC is used as part of the test and learning application distributed as part of VistALink.

rpcs.name: XOBV TEST LOCAL ARRAY
rpcs.description: This simple RPC takes an array as input, sets the array into a local  array and returns the local array information back to the client.   This RPC is used as part of the test and learning application distributed  as part of VistALink.

rpcs.name: XOBV TEST WORD PROCESSING
rpcs.description: This simple RPC takes no input parameters and returns a 'chunk' of text. This RPC is used to test whether VistALink properly transports 'chunks' of text.   This RPC is used as part of the test and learning application distributed as part of VistALink.

rpcs.name: XOBV TEST PING
rpcs.description: This simple RPC takes no input and returns a success message. This is the  primary mechanism to test whether the client successfully connects to an M server using VistALink.                                        This RPC is used as part of the test and learning application distributed as part of Vi

rpcs.name: XOBV TEST RPC LIST
rpcs.description: This RPC returns a list of RPC names that begin with the characters  indicated in the one input parameter.   This RPC is used as part of the test and learning application distributed as part of VistALink.

rpcs.name: XOBV TEST XML RESULTS
rpcs.description: This simple RPC takes no input parameters and returns a 'chunk' of data  that is in XML format.   This RPC is used to test whether VistALink properly transports and parses  application results in XML format.   This RPC is used as part of the test and learning application distributed as part of VistA

rpcs.name: XOBV TEST NOT IN CONTEXT
rpcs.description: This RPC should not be used and returns the empty string (null).   This RPC is used to test the 'not in RPC context' check.    For this reason, this RPC is specifically NOT in the 'XOBV VISTALINK TESTER' B-type option in the OPTION (#19) file.   This RPC is used as part of the test and learning appl

rpcs.name: PSB CHECK IV
rpcs.description: RPC PSB CHECK IV - When given a patient's data file number(DFN), this  process will return infusing IV information pertaining to the given  DFN.  The information will be returned at the location presented by the "RESULTS" parameter.

rpcs.name: PSB VITALS
rpcs.description: Passes array of Vital entries - Temp,Pulse,Resp,BP,Pain in the last 7 days

rpcs.name: PSB VITAL MEAS FILE
rpcs.description: This RPC has been built specifically to process the filing of BCMA  Pain Score data. The processing of other VITAL type may be incorporated  with some adjustments.       This routine is to service BCMA 3.0 functionality and store VITALs'   data into the VITAL MEASUREMENT FILE - ^GMR(120.5  using the

rpcs.name: DSIC ACTIVE PERSON CLASS
rpcs.description: This will return a user's active person class for a given date.

rpcs.name: ORRHCQ1 GETCNT
rpcs.description: Returns the count of sensitive patients left to evaluate after a main query iteration run.

rpcs.name: ORRHCQ1 QRYSITR
rpcs.description: Similar to the main query iterator routine, except does not process the patients marked as sensitive, and saves them off without screening them.  Subsequent routines are called to manage the list and process those selected for reporting.

rpcs.name: ORRHCQ1 QSITR
rpcs.description: Iterates through sensitive patients identified in a query tool report. Screens patients based on report criteria, and reports sensitive patients as necessary.

rpcs.name: ORRHCQ1 GETSPT
rpcs.description: Gets sensitive patients from a query tool cohort, where the patients have not yet been screened.

rpcs.name: ORRHCQ1 GETSLN
rpcs.description: When a query executes, the sensitive patients are saved off before they are evaluated, along with the sensitive information gathered from the routine PTSEC^DGSEC4.  This RPC returns the sensitive message text for the given patient when this query attempted to query their record.

rpcs.name: ORRHCQ1 DELSEN
rpcs.description: Deletes the sensitive patient from the sensitive patient list generated for the currently executing query.  No further evaluation of the  patients record will take place.

rpcs.name: ORRHCU DFLDMAP
rpcs.description: Returns a mapping from criteria categories to display field categories

rpcs.name: XHD DELETE PARAMETER CATEGORY
rpcs.description: This call deletes parameter categories from the M backing store. If the  second parameter, DELKIDS is passed as "1" (boolean true by M programming  convention), all descendents of the category in question will also be  deleted.

rpcs.name: XHD GET ALL PARAMETER DEFS
rpcs.description: Returns all Parameter Definitions.

rpcs.name: XHD GET CONFIGURATION
rpcs.description: Returns Configuration tree as XML in the following format:

rpcs.name: XHD GET MUTABLE CONFIGURATION
rpcs.description: Returns Configuration tree as XML in the following format:

rpcs.name: XHD GET PARAMETER DEF LIST
rpcs.description: Gets all parameter definitions as a list with IEN^NAME^DISPLAY NAME in  each node of the return array.

rpcs.name: XHD GET PARAMETER DEFINITION
rpcs.description: This call returns an XML representation of a Parameter Definition.

rpcs.name: XHD GET PARAMETER DEFINITIONS
rpcs.description: Gets parameter definitions as a list with IEN^NAME^DISPLAY NAME^ENTITYLIST in each node of the return array. This call returns a local array of SIZE  elements in DIR direction from the initial Definition FROM.

rpcs.name: XHD INSERT PARAMETER CATEGORY
rpcs.description: Inserts new parameter categories.

rpcs.name: XHD PUT PARAMETER
rpcs.description: Call PUT^XPAR or PUTWP^XPAR to file a given parameter.

rpcs.name: XHD REMOVE PARAMETER CATEGORY
rpcs.description: This call removes parameter categories from their parents (i.e., "prunes"  the branch of which the the category is the root). It does NOT delete the  Category or its descendents. Use the ORR DELETE PARAMETER CATEGORY to  delete a given categor and all its descendents.

rpcs.name: XHD UPDATE PARAMETER CATEGORY
rpcs.description: This call updates ParameterCategories.

rpcs.name: XHD GET SITE INFO
rpcs.description: Returns Division and Integration names and IDs.

rpcs.name: XHD GET USER DEMOGRAPHICS
rpcs.description: Returns same demographics as XHD AUTHORIZE, w/o the authorization step.  Used to populate the JAAS Subject when the SharedBroker is in use.

rpcs.name: XHDX PERSEL
rpcs.description: This returns the list of perspective id's that should be visible for the current user.

rpcs.name: XHDX VERSRV
rpcs.description: Returns a list of options and the associated version numbers.  The list of options is passed in.  Returns is a list of OptionName^VersionNumber.  The version number must be the last space piece in the MENU TEXT of the option.

rpcs.name: XHD TEST INPUT LIST
rpcs.description: This RPC returns the list that it's been passed. It's for test purposes  only.

rpcs.name: ORRCQLPT PTDFN
rpcs.description: RETURNS THE DFN GIVEN A REPORT LINE IDENTIFIER

rpcs.name: ORRCQLPT PTDEMOS
rpcs.description: Returns patient demographics info in the form: <dfn>^<name>^<ssn>^<dob>^<age>

rpcs.name: ORQQPXRM GEC DIALOG
rpcs.description: This RPC will evaluate the Reminder Dialogs as the Finish button is click for the GEC Project. THis RPC will return an error messages if the four GEC Reminder Dialogs are done out of order.

rpcs.name: ORQQPXRM GEC FINISHED?
rpcs.description: This RPC pass a boolean value to PXRMGECU

rpcs.name: ORQQPXRM GEC STATUS PROMPT
rpcs.description: This remote procedure will return the text value to display in CPRS of the  status of the current GEC Referral.

rpcs.name: ROR REPORT RETRIEVE
rpcs.description: The ROR REPORT RETRIEVE remote procedure returns an array that contains the report (in XML format) generated by the task.

rpcs.name: ROR REPORT SCHEDULE
rpcs.description: Schedules the report and returns the task information.

rpcs.name: ROR TASK INFO
rpcs.description: The ROR TASK INFO remote procedure returns the information about the task started from the GUI.

rpcs.name: ROR TASK LIST
rpcs.description: The ROR TASK LIST remote procedure returns a list of user's tasks  scheduled from the GUI.

rpcs.name: ROR GUI ACCESS
rpcs.description: The ROR ACCESS remote procedure returns a list of registries that the  user has access to (the user has appropriate security keys).

rpcs.name: ROR TASK DELETE
rpcs.description: The ROR TASK DELETE remote procedure completely deletes the task.

rpcs.name: ROR LOG GET LIST
rpcs.description: The ROR LOG GET LIST remote procedure returns a list of logs associated  with the registry in the provided time frame.

rpcs.name: ROR LOG GET MESSAGES
rpcs.description: The ROR LOG GET MESSAGES remote procedure returns a list of messages from the log defined by the parameter.

rpcs.name: ROR GUI PARAMETER GET
rpcs.description: The ROR GUI PARAMETER GET remote procedure retrieves the value of the GUI parameter.

rpcs.name: ROR GUI PARAMETER SET
rpcs.description: The ROR GUI PARAMETER SET remote procedure stores the parameter value and associates it with the provided entity (see the DBIA #2263 for more  details).

rpcs.name: ROR LOG GET ACCESS VIOLATIONS
rpcs.description: The ROR LOG GET ACCESS VIOLATIONS remote procedure returns the list of access violation events recorded in the provided time frame.

rpcs.name: ROR LIST REGISTRY USERS
rpcs.description: The ROR GET REGISTRY USERS remote procedure returns the list of registry  users (VistA users who have the appropriate security keys).

rpcs.name: ROR GET REGISTRY INFO
rpcs.description: The ROR GET REGISTRY INFO remote procedure returns basic information about the registry.

rpcs.name: ROR REPORTS AVAILABLE
rpcs.description: The ROR REPORTS AVAILABLE remote procedure returns a list of reports (and  their parameters) available for the registry.

rpcs.name: ROR LIST DIVISIONS
rpcs.description: The ROR LIST DIVISIONS remote procedure returns a list of divisions  defined in the MEDICAL CENTER DIVISION file (#40.8).

rpcs.name: ROR LIST HOSPITAL LOCATIONS
rpcs.description: The ROR LIST HOSPITAL LOCATIONS remote procedure returns a list of  hospital locations (defined in the HOSPITAL LOCATION file), which conform the criteria.

rpcs.name: ROR LIST VA DRUG CLASSES
rpcs.description: The ROR LIST VA DRUG CLASSES remote procedure returns a list of VA drug  classes (defined in the VA DRUG CLASS file), which conform to the search criteria.

rpcs.name: ROR LIST LABORATORY TESTS
rpcs.description: The ROR LIST LABORATORY TESTS remote procedure returns a list of  laboratory tests (defined in the LABORATORY TEST file), which conform the  criteria.

rpcs.name: ROR LOG INFO
rpcs.description: The ROR LOG INFO remote procedure returns the log information.

rpcs.name: ROR REPORT STYLESHEET
rpcs.description: The ROR REPORT STYLESHEET remote procedure retrieves the XSL stylesheet  associated with the report. If there is no stylesheet available, the  default one is returned.

rpcs.name: ROR TASK VALIDATE RESCHEDULING
rpcs.description: The ROR TASK VALIDATE RESCHEDULING remote procedure validates the  rescheduling code and returns the next date/time to run.

rpcs.name: ROR LIST PATIENTS
rpcs.description: The ROR LIST PATIENTS remote procedure returns either a list patients from the PATIENT file (#2) or a list of registry patients who conform the provided criteria.

rpcs.name: ROR PATIENT SELECTION RULES
rpcs.description: The ROR PATIENT SELECTION RULES remote procedure returns a list of  selection rules that have caused addition of the patient to the registry.

rpcs.name: ROR LIST ITEMS
rpcs.description: The ROR LIST ITEMS remote procedure returns a list of registry-specific  items from the ROR LIST ITEM file.

rpcs.name: ROR LIST COORDINATORS
rpcs.description: The ROR LIST COORDINATORS remote procedure returns a list of registry  coordinators. The list is retrieved from the COORDINATOR multiple (14) of the ROR REGISTRY PARAMETERS file (#798.1).

rpcs.name: ROR UPDATE COORDINATORS
rpcs.description: The ROR UPDATE COORDINATORS remote procedure updates the list of registry  coordinators that is stored in the COORDINATOR (14) multiple of the ROR  REGISTRY PARAMETERS file (#798.1).

rpcs.name: ROR LIST VISTA USERS
rpcs.description: The ROR LIST VISTA USERS remote procedure returns a list of users from the NEW PERSON file (#200).

rpcs.name: RORICR CDC LOAD
rpcs.description: The RORICR CDC LOAD remote procedure loads the data for the CDC form  that is edited/printed by the ICR registry.

rpcs.name: ROR LIST STATES
rpcs.description: The ROR LIST STATES remote procedure returns a list of states that conform the search criteria.

rpcs.name: RORICR CDC SAVE
rpcs.description: The RORICR CDC SAVE remote procedure updates the fields that are used by  the ICR CDC form.

rpcs.name: ROR GET USER INFO
rpcs.description: The ROR GET USER INFO remote procedure returns basic information about the user.

rpcs.name: ROR PATIENT GET DATA
rpcs.description: The ROR GET PATIENT DATA remote procedure returns patient's data from the  PATIENT file and (optionally) the registry record.

rpcs.name: ROR PATIENT DELETE
rpcs.description: The ROR PATIENT DELETE remote procedure marks the patient's record as  deleted from the registry. not deleted and an error code is returned.

rpcs.name: ROR LIST LOCAL LAB TESTS
rpcs.description: The ROR LIST LOCAL LAB TESTS remote procedure returns a list of local lab  tests, which are referenced by the LOCAL TEST NAME multiple (28) of the ROR REGISTRY PARAMETERS file (#798.1).

rpcs.name: ROR UPDATE LOCAL LAB TESTS
rpcs.description: The ROR UPDATE LOCAL LAB TESTS remote procedure updates the list of local Lab test names, which is stored in the LOCAL TEST NAME (28) multiple of the ROR REGISTRY PARAMETERS file (#798.1).

rpcs.name: ROR LIST LOCAL DRUGS
rpcs.description: The ROR LIST LOCAL DRUGS remote procedure returns a list of local drugs,  which are referenced by the LOCAL DRUG NAME multiple (29) of the ROR REGISTRY PARAMETERS file (#798.1).

rpcs.name: ROR UPDATE LOCAL DRUGS
rpcs.description: The ROR UPDATE LOCAL DRUGS remote procedure updates the list of local drug names, which is stored in the LOCAL DRUG NAME (29) multiple of the ROR REGISTRY PARAMETERS file (#798.1).

rpcs.name: ROR LIST DRUGS
rpcs.description: The ROR LIST DRUGS remote procedure returns a list of drugs (defined in the DRUG file), which conform the criteria.

rpcs.name: RORICR PATIENT LOAD
rpcs.description: The RORICR PATIENT LOAD remote procedure loads the patient's data from the ICR registry and prepares the record for editing.

rpcs.name: RORICR PATIENT SAVE
rpcs.description: The RORICR PATIENT SAVE remote procedure updates the patient's record in the registry (or creates one).

rpcs.name: RORICR CDC CANCEL
rpcs.description: The RORICR CDC CANCEL remote procedure cancels the editing process  initiated by the RORICR CDC LOAD remote procedure (see the LOCK parameter) and unlocks the registry records.

rpcs.name: ROR LIST GENERIC DRUGS
rpcs.description: The ROR LIST GENERIC DRUGS remote procedure returns a list of generic drugs, which are referenced by the ROR GENERIC DRUG file (#799.51).

rpcs.name: KMPD FILE SEARCH
rpcs.description: Search for entries in file.

rpcs.name: KMPD VERSION
rpcs.description: Get version number for CM Developer Tools application.

rpcs.name: KMPD FILE INQUIRY
rpcs.description: Return all data in file for specific entry.

rpcs.name: KMPD GLOBAL LIST
rpcs.description: Global list.

rpcs.name: KMPD ERROR LOG DATA
rpcs.description: Get data from file #3.075 (ERROR LOG).

rpcs.name: KMPD ROUTINE FIND
rpcs.description: Return list of routine names.

rpcs.name: KMPD ROUTINE INQ
rpcs.description: Routine inquiry.

rpcs.name: KMPD ROUTINE LINE SRCH
rpcs.description: Search routine(s) for text.

rpcs.name: KMPD ROUTINE STATS
rpcs.description: Routine stats from file #8972.1 (CAPMAN ROUTINE STATS).

rpcs.name: KMPD ROUTINE SAVE
rpcs.description: Save Routine.

rpcs.name: KMPD FM DATE
rpcs.description: Return user response as fm date.

rpcs.name: KMPD ERROR LOG DATE
rpcs.description: Get matching date or list of dates from file #3.075 (ERROR LOG).

rpcs.name: KMPD ASSOC ROUTINE ADD/DEL
rpcs.description: Delete all entries in multiple field #11 (ASSOCIATED ROUTINE) in file #8972.1 (CM CODE EVALUATOR) and then add entries to multiple.

rpcs.name: DVBAB TEMPLATE DEFINITION
rpcs.description: C&P Worksheet Templates are made of 3 files:  a form definition, a code  definition, and a script definition.   Set DVBIEN to the internal entry number of the form   Set DVBTYPE to the definition you want:          1= Form, 2=Script, 3=Report

rpcs.name: DVBAB NOTE TITLES
rpcs.description: Returns list of note titles from TIU in format name+"  "+type+"  "+status

rpcs.name: TIU GET DOCUMENTS FOR REQUEST
rpcs.description: This Remote Procedure returns the list of documents associated with a given Request (e.g., Consult Request, or Surgical Case).

rpcs.name: TIU IS THIS A SURGERY?
rpcs.description: BOOLEAN RPC which evaluates whether the title indicated is that of a SURGICAL REPORT or PROCEDURE REPORT (NON-O.R.).

rpcs.name: TIU IDENTIFY SURGERY CLASS
rpcs.description: This RPC returns the record number of the class identified by the CLNAME parameter in the TIU DOCUMENT DEFINITION file (#8925.1).

rpcs.name: TIU LONG LIST SURGERY TITLES
rpcs.description: This RPC serves data to a longlist of selectable TITLES for the class named in the CLNAME parameter.

rpcs.name: MD TMDUSER
rpcs.description: Manages the VistA interface to the TMDUser object.   Available options:   SIGNON     Connects session to the server and attempts signon.   ESIG       Verifies passed e-sig.   CHKVER     Verifies client version is compatible with server.

rpcs.name: MD TMDPARAMETER
rpcs.description: Used to set/retrieve/modify parameters in the Kernel ToolKit PARAMETERS (XPAR) files.   RPC is called as follows:   Param[0] := OPTION Param[1] := Entity Param[2] := Parameter name Param[3] := Instance Param[4] := Value

rpcs.name: MD TMDRECORDID
rpcs.description: General RPC for VA Fileman functions.   Param 1 is passed in as the function to perform and includes the following:   LOOKUP:   Performs very generic file lookup functionality VALIDATE: Validates input to a fileman field and saves to FDA DELREC:   Validates ability to delete and if able deletes a re

rpcs.name: MD TMDOUTPUT
rpcs.description: Manages the output of VistA data to the client via the default HFS device.

rpcs.name: DENTV FEE BASIS ADD
rpcs.description: This RPC adds, or edits a record in the Dental Fee Basis file (#228.5).

rpcs.name: DENTV FEE BASIS LIST
rpcs.description: This RPC gets a list of DENTAL FEE BASIS EXTRACT (#228.5) records for a specified patient.  The input is a single value, patient id (DFN).

rpcs.name: DENTV TP FILE PSR
rpcs.description: This RPC adds (or updates) a record to the Treatment Plan Transaction/Exam file (#228.2).  The only record type supported by this RPC is the PSR  type, where the TYPE field (.29) = 3.

rpcs.name: DENTV TP FILE PERIO
rpcs.description: This RPC adds (or updates) a reocrd to the Treatment Plan  Transaction/Exam file (#228.2).  The only record type supported by this  RPC is the Perio type, where the TYPE field (.29) = 2.

rpcs.name: DENTV TP FILE HNC
rpcs.description: This RPC adds, updates or marks as deleted, records to the Treatment Plan  Transaction/Exam file (#228.2).  The only record type supported by this  RPC is the Head and Neck type, where the TYPE field (.29)=4.

rpcs.name: DENTV TP ADD ENCOUNTER
rpcs.description: This will add a new record to the dental encounter file, 228.1

rpcs.name: DENTV TP GET ADA TABLE
rpcs.description: This returns the ADA table (file 228) for the Discus Treatment Planning  system.

rpcs.name: DENTV TP GET PROVIDERS
rpcs.description: This will return a list of all providers who have provided service to  this patient.  Each provider will have a flag indicating whether or not  the provider is current.

rpcs.name: DENTV TP FILE TOOTH NOTE
rpcs.description: This will allow you to add, update, or delete a record in file 228.6

rpcs.name: DENTV TP GET TOOTH NOTES
rpcs.description: This returns all the tooth notes for all dates for a patient.  The data  will be sorted by tooth number and then by reverse date.

rpcs.name: DENTV TP GET HNC
rpcs.description: Returns all of the Head&Neck records from the Treatment Plan  Transaction/Exam file (#228.2) for a particular patient.

rpcs.name: DENTV TP GET PSR
rpcs.description: Returns all of the PSR type records from the Treatment Plan  Transaction/Exam file (#228.2) for a particular patient.

rpcs.name: DENTV TP GET PERIO
rpcs.description: Returns all of the Perio type records from the Treatment Plan  Transaction/Exam file (#228.2) for a particular patient.

rpcs.name: DENTV TP FILE TRANSACTIONS
rpcs.description: This will file transaction data types to file 228.2.  It will also create  the DAS record (#221) if appropriate.  It will also file data to PCE if  appropriate.

rpcs.name: DENTV DELETE TRANSACTIONS
rpcs.description: This RPC deletes the dental encounter from the DENTAL HISTORY file  (#228.1) and dental transactions from the DENTAL TREATMENT PLAN/EXAM file (#228.2) for types=PSR, PerioExam and Head&Neck if the Transaction(s) for type=Transaction fails to file.

rpcs.name: DENTV TP GET TRANSACTIONS
rpcs.description: Returns all of the Transaction type records from the Treatment Plan  Transaction/Exam file (228.2) for a particular patient..

rpcs.name: DSIR FOIA VALIDATION
rpcs.description: This RPC will return a global array of all records thkat were looked at  for the year end FOIA report.  It will contain the internal request  number and patient name/FOIA indicator, and a one for any block on the  report that the given request was included on.  It also contains all  record that, dur

rpcs.name: DSIR TURNAROUND TIME REPORT
rpcs.description: This RPC will return a list of ROI Instance file IEN's and the Processing  time to either complete or to the end of the selected date range.

rpcs.name: DSIR CLEANUP EXEMPTIONS
rpcs.description: This RPC returna an array containing the internal numbers of any entry in  file 19620 that may have bogus data stored in the exemption fields. This  problem was corrected in the 5.2 version of the ROI package, this will  allow the ROI manager to review and correct the individual ROI requests.

rpcs.name: DSIR CLEAR FOLLOWUP DATES
rpcs.description: This RPC will go through the ROI Instance file (19620) and set the  current date as the Followup Letter Date for any entry that doesn't have  one.

rpcs.name: ORWPS REASON
rpcs.description: Returns list of Statement/Reasons for Non-VA medication orders.

rpcs.name: ORWDBA1 ORPKGTYP
rpcs.description: Array of Order Package Types

rpcs.name: ORWDBA1 RCVORCI
rpcs.description: Receive Order Entry Billing Aware data from CPRS.

rpcs.name: ORWDBA1 SCLST
rpcs.description: Array of Order ID's and SC.

rpcs.name: ORWDBA1 BASTATUS
rpcs.description: Billing Awareness RPC. Returns 0 if BA functionality is off or 1 if BA functionality is on.

rpcs.name: ORWORB SETSORT
rpcs.description: Sets the GUI alert sort method for the user.  This is set when a user  clicks on the GUI alert columns to change the display sorting.

rpcs.name: ORWORB GETSORT
rpcs.description: Returns the method for sorting GUI alert display.

rpcs.name: ORWOR EXPIRED
rpcs.description: Returns the Fileman Date/Time to begin searching for expired orders.

rpcs.name: ORWDPS32 AUTHNVA
rpcs.description: Checks restrictions for entering non-VA meds.  If no restrictions, a 0 is returned.  If there is a restriction, it is returned in the format: 1^restriction text

rpcs.name: DENTV REPORT PROVIDERS
rpcs.description: Returns an array containing all dental providers with 8 character  Provider Ids that belong to the selected division.  If the provider has  no divisions listed in file 200, then they show up under any division  selection.

rpcs.name: DENTV REPORT DATA
rpcs.description: Retrieves Dental Report data for a specified time period and station.

rpcs.name: DENTV GET ALL PROVIDERS
rpcs.description: Gets all providers (including inactive) for edit purposes.

rpcs.name: DENTV GET PROVIDER TYPES
rpcs.description: Gets a list of Provider Types from the DENTAL PROVIDER TYPE (220.51) file.

rpcs.name: DENTV GET PROVIDER SPECIALTIES
rpcs.description: Gets a list of all active Provider Specialties from file 220.52.

rpcs.name: DENTV PROVIDER ADD UPDATE
rpcs.description: This RPC allows Dental Record Manager to add/edit their Dental Providers.

rpcs.name: DENTV NEW EXTRACT
rpcs.description: This RPC queues off the Dental Extract at a user designated time.  Upon  completion of the extract, a TCP/IP client will be called from the tasked  job to send the data to a text file.

rpcs.name: MPIF CMOR PUSH REMOTE
rpcs.description: This remote procedure call (RPC) allows the DQ team to remotely create a  change of CMOR push.

rpcs.name: MAG4 POST PROCESS ACTIONS
rpcs.description: This is call to perform any post processing action required on   a newly saved image of this type.  post processing (for now) is   determined by the IMAGE INDEX FOR TYPES file.  If this image   points to an entry in that file that has Action turned ON, then   the TAG^ROUTINE will be called with the

rpcs.name: MAG4 INDEX GET TYPE
rpcs.description: This Remote Procedure Call is used to filter out those image types that belong to a given image category (Class).   When images are displayed, it is desirable to limit the list of presented images to only those that are likely to be relevant in the current context.   This procedure accepts an "image

rpcs.name: MAG4 INDEX GET EVENT
rpcs.description: This call will return an array of INDEX PROCEDURE/EVENT(s) based on the input parameters CLS (Class) and SPEC (Specialty/subspecialty) When images are displayed, it is desirable to limit the list of presented images to only those that are likely to be relevant in the current context.   This procedur

rpcs.name: MAG4 INDEX GET SPECIALTY
rpcs.description: This call will return an array of INDEX SPECIALTY/SUBSPECIALTIES based on the input parameters CLS (Class) and EVENT (Procedure/Event) When images are displayed, it is desirable to limit the list of presented images to only those that are likely to be relevant in the current context.   This procedur

rpcs.name: MAG4 PAT GET IMAGES
rpcs.description: This Remote Procedure Call is used to filter out those specialty for which a given image category may be relevant.   When images are displayed, it is desirable to limit the list of presented images to only those that are likely to be relevant in the current context.   This procedure accepts a patien

rpcs.name: MAG4 GET IMAGE INFO
rpcs.description: Returns specific fields of an image entry, to be displayed in the image information window.

rpcs.name: MAG4 GET FILE FORMAT INFO
rpcs.description: Returns information given a file extension. (Format)

rpcs.name: MAG GET ENV
rpcs.description: Returns environment variables from VistA server

rpcs.name: MAG4 CT PRESETS SAVE
rpcs.description: Saves the CT Presets from the Radiology Viewer in Clinical Display   as site Specific Presets.

rpcs.name: MAG4 CT PRESETS GET
rpcs.description: Returns the site specific CT Presets

rpcs.name: MAG4 FILTER DETAILS
rpcs.description: Returns the property values of a single filter

rpcs.name: MAG4 FILTER GET LIST
rpcs.description: Returns a list of Image Filters Either for a specific user (Private filters) or Public filters. Some Public filters are distributed with the installation. Public filters can also be created by the Imaging site manager.

rpcs.name: MAG4 FILTER SAVE
rpcs.description: Stores the new filter to the IMAGE LIST FILTERS file (#2005.87) or updates properties of the existing filter.

rpcs.name: MAG4 FILTER DELETE
rpcs.description: Deletes a Filter entry in the IMAGE LIST FILTERS file.

rpcs.name: MAG DIRHASH
rpcs.description: +---------------------------------------------------------------+ | Property of the US Government.                                | | No permission to copy or redistribute this software is given. | | Use of unreleased versions of this software requires the user | | to execute a written test agreemen

rpcs.name: MAGG INSTALL
rpcs.description: This is a list of all Image package installs on the host system. This list comes from the Install file.

rpcs.name: MAGG CONS
rpcs.description: This function returns the boolean value used to determine whether the Imaging site is operating in the Consolidation mode.

rpcs.name: MAGG PLACE
rpcs.description: This rpc returns the IEN of the 2006.1 entry that is appropriate for  the multi institution parameter designated by the users DUZ(2).

rpcs.name: MAG FLD ATT
rpcs.description: This RPC returns a list of field attributes.

rpcs.name: DSIC PX GET SELECTED VISITS
rpcs.description: This will return information on selected visits for a patient based upon  the screening factors.

rpcs.name: DSIC PX GET VISIT INFO2
rpcs.description: Return all field values for a visit in internal or external format or  both.

rpcs.name: DSIC CPT FIND
rpcs.description: For a lookup value, this will return a list of CPT codes matching that  lookup value.

rpcs.name: DSIC TIU LIST SPECIAL DOCS
rpcs.description: There are certain TIU documents which are in special classes.  These  documents are linked to other VistA files.  The TIU Document file has a  Fileman Variable Pointer linking that document to the owning file.   Surgical Notes and Clinical Procedure notes are of this type.  This RPC  will return a l

rpcs.name: DSIC TIU GET RECORD TEXT
rpcs.description: This was mainly written to allow one M routine to get the text of any  signed progress note.  This function is exposed to the GUI.  However, GUI  applications should use the TIU get document RPC in lieu of this RPC in  most cases.

rpcs.name: DENTV TP GET OLD ENCOUNTERS
rpcs.description: Returns a list of all complete and/or terminated encounters for a  selected patient.

rpcs.name: DENTV FILE PARAMETERS
rpcs.description: This RPC allows the Dental software to file word processing type  parameters.

rpcs.name: DENTV TP FILE RESERVED TXNS
rpcs.description: Saves transaction information for a particular Dental provider and  patient.  Reserved transactions are not filed to Dental History, DAS or  PCE.

rpcs.name: DENTV TP GET RESERVED TXNS
rpcs.description: Returns all reserved transactions for a particular Dental provider and patient.

rpcs.name: DENTV GET VA-DSS PRODUCTS
rpcs.description: Returns all of the VA-DSS product lines from the DENTAL GROUPING FOR  VA-DSS file.

rpcs.name: OOPS GET MISC REPORT DATA
rpcs.description: This broker call will return data to generate reports on the Delphi Client side.  It is a generic call that needs the start date, end date, station number (or A for all stations), and the report call or name.

rpcs.name: OOPS SELECT CA7
rpcs.description: This broker call returns a list of valid Request for Compensation claims (CA-7) for the employee or Workers' Comp Specialist.

rpcs.name: OOPS LIST CAS
rpcs.description: This broker call returns a listing of all the valid CA's (either 1 or 2) that can be selected by this user to create a new Request for Compensation (CA-7) claim.

rpcs.name: OOPS MULTIPLE DATA
rpcs.description: This broker call will be used to both get and set data stored in a sub-record or multiple.  When saving (setting) data, the entire subrecord is deleted then re-filed.

rpcs.name: OOPS SET DUAL BENEFITS DATA
rpcs.description: This broker call files data in the DUAL Node of the ASISTS Accident Reporting File (#2260).

rpcs.name: OOPS SIGN CA7

rpcs.name: XU REBUILD MENU TREE
rpcs.description: This API rebuilds the menu trees and display nodes for a single user  (DUZ). It returns 0 if unsuccessful, 1 if successful.

rpcs.name: DG VIC PATIENT LOOKUP
rpcs.description: This RPC will allow lookup of a patient with the input from a VIC card or DOD CAC card. The VIC card can be an old VIC card or the newer VIC 4.0 card.  The entire card's input should be provided.  If the patient is known locally the patient's DFN will be returned.

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS GET TRACKING LIST
rpcs.description: This RPC returns a list of Consults captured through HL7 that are from a  defined Fee Service/Specialty, and have been updated through a Consult  action. Those actions include, Comment, Forward, Edit/Resubmit, Complete,  Forward, Significant Findings, Cancel/Deny, or Discontinue.

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS DEL TRACKING
rpcs.description: This RPC will delete FBCS Consult Tracking Records (truly mark as hidden)  so they will no longer be returned. The Consult Tracking records are not  truly deleted as they are still being used to look for  Comment/Significant Finding updates that may occur. After 90 days of  inactivity, they are remo

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS GET CONSULT
rpcs.description: This RPC will return details for a single Consult that uses the same  format as DSIF CNSLTS FEE CONSULTS.

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS ISPROSVC
rpcs.description: This RPC will return whether the specified Consult Service is part of the  Consults-Prosthetics Interface.   Cloned from ORQQCN ISPROSVC

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS DEFAULT REASON
rpcs.description: This RPC returns the specified Consult Service default reason for request.   Cloned from ORQQCN DEFAULT REQUEST REASON RPC.

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS PROVDX
rpcs.description: This RPC returns the Provisional Diagnosis for the specified Consult.   Cloned from ORQQCN PROVDX

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS SVC W/SYNONYMS
rpcs.description: This RPC returns a list of Services with synonyms.   Cloned from ORQQCN SVC W/SYNONYMS.

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS SVCTREE
rpcs.description: This RPC returns a list of Consult Services.   Cloned from ORQQCN SVCTREE.

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS SCHEDULE
rpcs.description: This RPC updates a Consult with the action of Scheduled.   Cloned from ORQQCN SCH

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS SET ACT MENU
rpcs.description: This RPC returns the permissions a user has for the Consult selected, and  what actions they are allowed to take.   Cloned from ORQQCN SET ACT MENU

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS ADDCMT
rpcs.description: This RPC allows for the adding of a Comment to a Consult.   Cloned from ORQQCN ADDCMT

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS SIG FIND
rpcs.description: This RPC allows for Significant Findings updates to be added to a Consult.   Cloned from ORQQCN SIG FIND

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS ADMIN COMPLETE
rpcs.description: This RPC allows for the admin completion of the selected Consult.   Cloned from ORQQCN ADMIN COMPLETE

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS DISCONTINUE
rpcs.description: This RPC allows for the discontinuing of a selected Consult.   Cloned from ORQQCN DISCONTINUE

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS FORWARD
rpcs.description: This RPC allows for a Consult to be forwarded to a different Service.   Cloned from ORQQCN FORWARD

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS RESUBMIT
rpcs.description: This RPC allows for a consult to be resubmitted.   Cloned from ORQQCN RESUBMIT

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS LOAD FOR EDIT
rpcs.description: This RPC loads a Consult so that it can be edited.   Cloned from ORQQCN LOAD FOR EDIT

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS GET ORDER NUM
rpcs.description: Returns the order number for a specified consult.   Cloned from ORQQCN GET ORDER NUM

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS CAN EDIT
rpcs.description: RPC to determine whether a consult can be edited.   Cloned from ORQQCN CAN EDIT

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS LEX
rpcs.description: This RPC performs a Lexicon search based upon what is passed in.   Cloned from LEX^ORWPCE

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS LEXCODE
rpcs.description: Returns the Lexicon code for a given IEN.

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS PURGE TRACKING
rpcs.description: This RPC allows for purging of tracking records from within VistA by the  Authorization GUI. This will allow us to do bulk deletes through the  Purge Utility found in Authorization.

rpcs.name: DSIF CNSLTS UNHIDE CONSULT
rpcs.description: This RPC will unhide a Consult hidden in the FBCS Consult Tracking  (#19655) file.

rpcs.name: DVBAD CONTRACTED EXAM REPORTS
rpcs.description: Allows demTRAN (GUI) to execute the Detailed, Summary and Timeliness  contracted exam reports.

rpcs.name: DVBAD CONTRACTED EXAM CRYPTO
rpcs.description: Allows the demTRAN (GUI) application to Encrypt/Decrypt information for  storage to or retrieval from the VistA environment.

rpcs.name: DVBAB SEND MSG TWO
rpcs.description: THIS RPC IS THE SECOND FOR THE CAPRI MSG 2507 EXAM THIS ONE PRODUCES A MESSAGE FOR EACH EXAM THAT IS COMPLETED

rpcs.name: MAGQ LOGV
rpcs.description: This provides a method of capturing errors logged during the BP Verifier process.  This function provides a list which can be examined at a later date and will be rolled into verifier log file on the BP Server or network log file share.

rpcs.name: VPR GET PATIENT DATA JSON
rpcs.description: This RPC retrieves the requested data from VistA, and returns it in ^TMP("VPR",$J,n) as JSON.

rpcs.name: VPR GET CHECKSUM
rpcs.description: This RPC retrieves the requested data from VistA and returns its checksum.

rpcs.name: PSB WITNESS
rpcs.description: Used by frmWintess to validate if a Witness at the client is authorized  to be a witness for a BCMA action, i.e. High Risk Drug administration.   Validation is achieved via not allowing the logged in person to witness  for themselves, also persons that hold certain keys can't be a valid  witness.

rpcs.name: PSB CLINICLIST
rpcs.description: Returns Active Clinic names based on Search criteria.

rpcs.name: PSB MEDS ON PATIENT
rpcs.description: This RPC returns indicators if medications are still on a patient.  The  patient's DFN will be passed in and a RESULTS array returned with three  flags set.  Flags set to 1 for meds are on patient or 0 none per this category.

rpcs.name: VPS PATIENT CHECK-IN
rpcs.description: Called by Vetlink Kiosk system.  The RPC will accept a single value as input representing the string of pending appointments that the patient is to be checked-in.; and the output produced will be an array that returns the results of each attempted check-in.

rpcs.name: VPS PATIENT PRE-REGISTRATION
rpcs.description: There are  2 input parameters for the RPC call  sent by the Vetlink kiosk  Pre-registration event. Inputs:  DFN and Status Code. Patient DFN -1st input parameter of the RPC call, required.  Status Code - code that represents the outcome of the pre-registration  interview with the patient, required.

rpcs.name: VPS EDIT PATIENT DEMOGRAPHIC
rpcs.description: Called by the Vetlink Kiosk system. The VAMC staff will make changes to the patient demographic record via the Vecna Kiosk and submit the changes to VistA.  The RPC will accept 3 parameters.  The first parameter represents the return value as required by RPC Broker, the 2nd parameter is an input val

rpcs.name: VPS GET SITES
rpcs.description: Called by the Vetlink Kiosk system.  Patient SSN is the input value.   Return value is a list of treating facilities associated with the patient  given the SSN.

rpcs.name: VPS GET DFN
rpcs.description: Called by the Vetlink Kiosk system.  Patient SSN is the input value.   Returns patient DFN associated with SSN on record.

rpcs.name: VPS FULLSSN
rpcs.description: Returns a list of patients with SSNs that match the value stored in ID.

rpcs.name: VPS LAST5
rpcs.description: Returns a list of patients matching LastNameInitial_Last4SSN based on Restricted Patient List.

rpcs.name: VPS LIST ALL
rpcs.description: Returns a list of patients with names start with (** NOT PREFIXED BY **)  the input value. Only 44 records will be returned to the caller.   e.q:  If Patient File contains patient names 'AA', 'AB', 'BB', 'BC, 'CC', 'CD' in this order and caller passes in 'A', all of those patients will be included i

rpcs.name: VPS GET2 PATIENT DEMOGRAPHIC
rpcs.description: Called by the Vetlink Kiosk system. The RPC will accept two input parameters  which are the patient SSN or DFN and the patient type. The RPC returns the  patient demographics,insurance, and appointments (Starting from T-60 and  including future appointments).

rpcs.name: DSIRPARM EN ENTER/EDIT
rpcs.description: This RPC will enter/edit the entries in the DSIR FACILITY PARAMETERS File  (#10620.701).

rpcs.name: DSIRPARM RTRV GET PARAMS
rpcs.description: This is the RPC that will retrieve the ROI parameters from file  #19620.701 DSIR FACILITY PARAMETERS File.

rpcs.name: DSIRPARM ENPO UPDATE PR ORD
rpcs.description: This RPC is used to enter/edit the default Print Order of documents  released by each facility specified in the DSIR FACILITY PARAMETERS File  (#19620.701).  This data is stored in the DSIR ROI PRINT ORDER File  (#19620.702).

rpcs.name: DSIRPARM GETPO GET PRINT ORDER
rpcs.description: This RPC will return the document Print Order for the specified ROI type  and facility.

rpcs.name: DSIRPARM LISTPO LIST PR ORDERS
rpcs.description: This RPC will return a list of the print orders for a specified facility.

rpcs.name: DSIRLTRS UPDATE
rpcs.description: This RPC will add/update letters in file 19620.16 (DSIR LOCAL LETTERS).

rpcs.name: DSIRLTRS GETLTRS
rpcs.description: This RPC will return the letter definition from file 19610.16 (DSIR LOCAL  LETTERS) or file 19620.15 (DSIR NATIONAL LETTERS) for use by the ROI Plus  GUI as needed to be printed or to edit.

rpcs.name: DSIRLTRS LISTLTRS
rpcs.description: This RPC will return an alphabetically sorted array containing the IEN (Internal Entry Numbers) and names of the letters contianed in either file 19620.15 (DSIR NATIONAL LETTERS) or file 19620.16 (DSIR LOCAL LETTERS) as specified in the input parameter.

rpcs.name: DSIRLTRS DELETE
rpcs.description: This RPC will delete entries from file 19620.16 (DSIR LOCAL LETTERS)  provided the letter specified is not flagged as a "National" letter.   Certain letter titles are required by the GUI to exist and as such are  not to be removed from this file.

rpcs.name: DSIRLTRS NATIONAL
rpcs.description: This RPC is a wrapper around DSIRLTRS UPDATE with the exception that it  will update the national letters in file 19620.15 (DSIR NATIONAL  LETTERS).  This RPC should not be used at the site but is for DSS Inc. to  apply updates to the national letters as requested/instructed by the VA  Privacy Offic

rpcs.name: DSIRRPT5 DEAD PATIENT REQUESTS
rpcs.description: This RPC will look for any ROI Plus request that was entered after the  patient died.

rpcs.name: DSIRPARM DELETE PARM/PO/SCL
rpcs.description: This RPC will delete entries in files 19620.701 (DSIR FACILITY  PARAMETERS), 19620.702 (DSIR ROI PRINT ORDER) or 19620.703 (DSIR  SENSITIVE CLINIC) based on the file specified in the second input  parameter.

rpcs.name: DSIRPARM SENCLN ADD
rpcs.description: This RPC will add entries into file 19620.703 (DSIR SENSITIVE CLINIC) for  use by the ROI Plus application when it identifies documents related to a  clinic that the ROI department consider sensitive.

rpcs.name: DSIRPARM LSTCLN LIST CLINICS
rpcs.description: This RPC will return a list of all the clinics that the ROI department  has flagged as sensitive for their disclosure purposes.

rpcs.name: DSIRPARM LSTFAC LIST FACILITY
rpcs.description: This RPC will return a list of facilities with defined parameter settings  in the DSIR FACILITY PARAMETERS (#19620.701).

rpcs.name: DVBA CAPRI EXAM XML
rpcs.description: This RPC allows for the filling of the 2507 EXAM template in the XML  version.

rpcs.name: DVBA CAPRI EXAM LINK TIU
rpcs.description: Links an exam in CAPRI TEMPLATES #396.17 to TIU DOCUMENT #8925

rpcs.name: DVBA CAPRI GET EXAM IEN
rpcs.description: get an exam ien from the CAPRI TEMMPLATE #396.17 given a tiu ien from TIU DOCUMENT #8925

rpcs.name: EC ICD10IMPLEMENTATIONDATE
rpcs.description: The EC ICD10IMPLEMENTATIONDATE RPC returns the Implementation Date of ICD-10 Code Set in MM/DD/YYYY format OR  -1^Error Message.

rpcs.name: ROR LIST ICD
rpcs.description: The ROR LIST ICD remote procedure returns a list of ICD codes (from the ICD DIAGNOSIS or ICD OPERATION/PROCEDURE file), which conform the criteria.

rpcs.name: ORWPCE I10IMPDT
rpcs.description: This RPC returns the ICD-10 implementation date in FM Date/Time format.

rpcs.name: ORWLEX GETFREQ
rpcs.description: This call wraps the Lexicon API $$FREQ^LEXU to satisfy the requirements  of the ICD-10-CM diagnosis search.

rpcs.name: ORWGN IDTVALID
rpcs.description: Returns the implementation date of the coding system passed in

rpcs.name: ORWGN MAXFRQ
rpcs.description: This RPC checks if the frequency of an ICD-10 search term is than the  maximum allowed ICD-10 return values.

rpcs.name: PX SAVE DATA
rpcs.description: The purpose of this RPC is to allow the calling application to save data  to PCE, such as Immunization data. See the Integration Control  Registration document for the full description of the data needed.

rpcs.name: MAGTP GET ACTIVE
rpcs.description: Get list of all unreleased (FLAG=0) or released (FLAG=1) reports, filter by back days for unreleased reports. Filter by Station Number if consultations are present for a case.

rpcs.name: MAGTP GET CASES
rpcs.description: Get a list of selected unreleased or released reports

rpcs.name: MAGTP GET CPRS REPORT
rpcs.description: Get lab info for a case (ex.: SP 12 2). The layout is similar to the one in CPRS. The original code has been used by RPC call ORWRP REPORT TEXT.

rpcs.name: MAGTP GET NOTE
rpcs.description: Retrieve the text of a note attached to a specified case.

rpcs.name: MAGTP GET PREFERENCES
rpcs.description: Get the user's setting/configuration preferences in XML format from the configuration file (#2006.13)

rpcs.name: MAGTP GET RETENTION DAYS

rpcs.name: MAGTP GET SLIDES
rpcs.description: Get Specimen, Smear Prep/Block and Stain/Procedure/Slide info for a specified case

rpcs.name: MAGTP GET USER

rpcs.name: MAGTP PUT NOTE

rpcs.name: MAGTP PUT PREFERENCES
rpcs.description: Set the user's setting/configuration preferences in XML format in the configuration file (#2006.13)

rpcs.name: MAGTP RESERVE CASE
rpcs.description: Set/Unset a logical lock on a case for reservation

rpcs.name: MAGTP SET RETENTION DAYS
